title: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
summary_full: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
summary_public: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
